de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util

Class SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util.SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil

  • public final class SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil
extends Object
    Provides utility methods for side proofs.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      protected static class  SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.ContainsIrrelevantThingsVisitor
      Utility class used by QuerySideProofRule#containsIrrelevantThings(Services, SequentFormula, Set).
      protected static class  SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.ContainsModalityOrQueryVisitor
      Utility method used by QuerySideProofRule#containsModalityOrQuery(Term).

      private SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil()
      Forbid instances.

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static void addNewNamesToNamespace(Services services, Term term)
      Makes sure that all used Names in the given Term are registered in the Namespaces of the given Services.

      Creates a copy of the ProofEnvironment of the given Proof which has his own OneStepSimplifier instance.

      Creates a copy of the ProofEnvironment of the given Proof which has his own OneStepSimplifier instance.
      static Sequent computeGeneralSequentToProve(Sequent goalSequent, SequentFormula currentSF)
      Computes a general Sequent to prove in a side proof which contains all SequentFormula of the original Sequent except the given current SequentFormula and those which contains modalities and queries.

      Starts the side proof and extracts the result Term.

      Starts the side proof and extracts the result Term and conditions.

      Extracts the operator term for the formula with the given Operator from the given Goal.

    • Constructor Detail

      • SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil

        private SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil()
        Forbid instances.

    • Method Detail

      • computeGeneralSequentToProve

        public static Sequent computeGeneralSequentToProve(Sequent goalSequent,
                                   SequentFormula currentSF)
        Computes a general Sequent to prove in a side proof which contains all SequentFormula of the original Sequent except the given current SequentFormula and those which contains modalities and queries.
        Parameters:
        goalSequent - The original Sequent of the current Goal.
        currentSF - The SequentFormula to ignore.
        Returns:
        The general initial Sequent.

      • computeResults

        public static List<Pair<Term,Node>> computeResults(Services services,
                                   Proof proof,
                                   ProofEnvironment sideProofEnvironment,
                                   Sequent sequentToProve,
                                   TermLabel label,
                                   String description,
                                   String methodTreatment,
                                   String loopTreatment,
                                   String queryTreatment,
                                   String splittingOption,
                                   boolean addNamesToServices)
                                            throws ProofInputException

        Starts the side proof and extracts the result Term.

        New used names are automatically added to the Namespace of the Services.

        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        proof - The Proof from on which the side proof si performed.
        sideProofEnvironment - The given ProofEnvironment of the side proof.
        sequentToProve - The Sequent to prove in a side proof.
        label - The TermLabel which is used to compute the result.
        description - The side proof description.
        splittingOption - The splitting options to use.
        addNamesToServices - true defines that used names in result and conditions are added to the namespace of the given Services, false means that names are not added.
        Returns:
        The found result Term and the conditions.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      • computeResultsAndConditions

        public static List<Triple<Term,Set<Term>,Node>> computeResultsAndConditions(Services services,
                                                            Proof proof,
                                                            ProofEnvironment sideProofEnvironment,
                                                            Sequent sequentToProve,
                                                            Operator operator,
                                                            String description,
                                                            String methodTreatment,
                                                            String loopTreatment,
                                                            String queryTreatment,
                                                            String splittingOption,
                                                            boolean addNamesToServices)
                                                                     throws ProofInputException

        Starts the side proof and extracts the result Term and conditions.

        New used names are automatically added to the Namespace of the Services.

        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        proof - The Proof from on which the side proof si performed.
        sideProofEnvironment - The given ProofEnvironment of the side proof.
        sequentToProve - The Sequent to prove in a side proof.
        operator - The Operator which is used to compute the result.
        description - The side proof description.
        splittingOption - The splitting options to use.
        addNamesToServices - true defines that used names in result and conditions are added to the namespace of the given Services, false means that names are not added.
        Returns:
        The found result Term and the conditions.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      • constructResultIfContained

        private static Term constructResultIfContained(Services services,
                              SequentFormula sf,
                              Operator operator)

      • constructResultIfContained

        private static Term constructResultIfContained(Services services,
                              Term term,
                              Operator operator)

      • isOperatorASequentFormula

        private static boolean isOperatorASequentFormula(Sequent sequent,
                                Operator operator)

      • addNewNamesToNamespace

        public static void addNewNamesToNamespace(Services services,
                          Term term)
        Makes sure that all used Names in the given Term are registered in the Namespaces of the given Services.
        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        term - The Term to check its Names.

      • containsModalityOrQuery

        public static boolean containsModalityOrQuery(SequentFormula sf)
        Checks if the given SequentFormula contains a modality or query.
        Parameters:
        sf - The SequentFormula to check.
        Returns:
        true contains at least one modality or query, false contains no modalities and no queries.

      • containsModalityOrQuery

        public static boolean containsModalityOrQuery(Term term)
        Checks if the given Term contains a modality or query.
        Parameters:
        term - The Term to check.
        Returns:
        true contains at least one modality or query, false contains no modalities and no queries.

      • extractRelevantThings

        public static Set<Operator> extractRelevantThings(Services services,
                                  Sequent sequentToProve)
        Extracts all Operators from the given Sequent which represents relevant things.
        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        sequentToProve - The Sequent to extract relevant things from.
        Returns:
        The found relevant things.

      • isRelevantThing

        protected static boolean isRelevantThing(Services services,
                      Term term)
        Checks if the given Term describes a relevant thing. Relevant things are:
        • IProgramVariable
        • Functions of type Heap
        • Functions of a Java type
        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        term - The Term to check.
        Returns:
        true is relevant thing, false is not relevant.

      • isIrrelevantCondition

        public static boolean isIrrelevantCondition(Services services,
                            Sequent initialSequent,
                            Set<Operator> relevantThingsInSequentToProve,
                            SequentFormula sf)
        Checks if the given SequentFormula is a relevant condition.
        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        initialSequent - The initial Sequent of the side proof.
        relevantThingsInSequentToProve - The relevant things found in the initial Sequent.
        sf - The SequentFormula to check.
        Returns:
        true SequentFormula is relevant condition, false SequentFormula is not a relevant condition.

      • containsIrrelevantThings

        public static boolean containsIrrelevantThings(Services services,
                               SequentFormula sf,
                               Set<Operator> relevantThings)
        Checks if the given SequentFormula contains irrelevant things (things which are not contained in the relevantThingsToProve and are no Java types)
        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        sf - The SequentFormula to check.
        relevantThings - The relevant things.
        Returns:
        true The SequentFormula contains irrelevant things, false the SequentFormula contains no irrelevant things.

      • startSideProof

        public static ApplyStrategy.ApplyStrategyInfo startSideProof(Proof proof,
                                             ProofEnvironment sideProofEnvironment,
                                             Sequent sequentToProve)
                                                      throws ProofInputException
        Starts a site proof for the given Sequent.
        Parameters:
        proof - The parent Proof of the site proof to do.
        sideProofEnvironment - The given ProofEnvironment of the side proof.
        sequentToProve - The Sequent to prove.
        Returns:
        The proof result represented as ApplyStrategy.ApplyStrategyInfo instance.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception

      • startSideProof

        public static ApplyStrategy.ApplyStrategyInfo startSideProof(Proof proof,
                                             ProofEnvironment sideProofEnvironment,
                                             Sequent sequentToProve,
                                             String methodTreatment,
                                             String loopTreatment,
                                             String queryTreatment,
                                             String splittingOption)
                                                      throws ProofInputException
        Starts a site proof for the given Sequent.
        Parameters:
        proof - The parent Proof of the site proof to do.
        sideProofEnvironment - The given ProofEnvironment of the side proof.
        sequentToProve - The Sequent to prove.
        Returns:
        The proof result represented as ApplyStrategy.ApplyStrategyInfo instance.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception

      • createSideProof

        public static ProofStarter createSideProof(ProofEnvironment sideProofEnvironment,
                           Sequent sequentToProve,
                           String proofName)
                                    throws ProofInputException
        Creates a new ProofStarter which contains a new site proof of the given Proof.
        Parameters:
        sideProofEnvironment - The given ProofEnvironment of the side proof.
        sequentToProve - The Sequent to proof in a new site proof.
        proofName - An optional name for the newly created Proof.
        Returns:
        The created ProofStarter with the site proof.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      • startSideProof

        public static ApplyStrategy.ApplyStrategyInfo startSideProof(Proof proof,
                                             ProofStarter starter,
                                             String methodTreatment,
                                             String loopTreatment,
                                             String queryTreatment,
                                             String splittingOption)
        Starts a site proof.
        Parameters:
        proof - The original Proof.
        starter - The ProofStarter with the site proof.
        splittingOption - The splitting option to use.
        Returns:
        The site proof result.

      • extractOperatorValue

        public static Term extractOperatorValue(Goal goal,
                        Operator operator)
        Extracts the value for the formula with the given Operator from the given Goal.
        Parameters:
        goal - The Goal to search the Operator in.
        operator - The Operator for the formula which should be extracted.
        Returns:
        The value of the formula with the given Operator.

      • extractOperatorValue

        public static Term extractOperatorValue(Node node,
                        Operator operator)
        Extracts the value for the formula with the given Operator from the given Node.
        Parameters:
        node - The Node to search the Operator in.
        operator - The Operator for the formula which should be extracted.
        Returns:
        The value of the formula with the given Operator.

      • extractOperatorTerm

        public static Term extractOperatorTerm(ApplyStrategy.ApplyStrategyInfo info,
                       Operator operator)
                                throws ProofInputException
        Extracts the operator term for the formula with the given Operator from the site proof result (ApplyStrategy.ApplyStrategyInfo).
        Parameters:
        info - The site proof result.
        operator - The Operator for the formula which should be extracted.
        Returns:
        The operator term of the formula with the given Operator.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      • extractOperatorTerm

        public static Term extractOperatorTerm(Goal goal,
                       Operator operator)
        Extracts the operator term for the formula with the given Operator from the given Goal.
        Parameters:
        goal - The Goal to search the Operator in.
        operator - The Operator for the formula which should be extracted.
        Returns:
        The operator term of the formula with the given Operator.

      • extractOperatorTerm

        public static Term extractOperatorTerm(Node node,
                       Operator operator)
        Extracts the operator term for the formula with the given Operator from the given Node.
        Parameters:
        node - The Node to search the Operator in.
        operator - The Operator for the formula which should be extracted.
        Returns:
        The operator term of the formula with the given Operator.

      • cloneProofEnvironmentWithOwnOneStepSimplifier

        public static ProofEnvironment cloneProofEnvironmentWithOwnOneStepSimplifier(Proof source,
                                                             boolean useSimplifyTermProfile)
        Creates a copy of the ProofEnvironment of the given Proof which has his own OneStepSimplifier instance. Such copies are required for instance during parallel usage of site proofs because OneStepSimplifier has an internal state.
        Parameters:
        source - The Proof to copy its ProofEnvironment.
        Returns:
        The created ProofEnvironment which is a copy of the environment of the given Proof but with its own OneStepSimplifier instance.

      • cloneProofEnvironmentWithOwnOneStepSimplifier

        public static ProofEnvironment cloneProofEnvironmentWithOwnOneStepSimplifier(InitConfig sourceInitConfig,
                                                             boolean useSimplifyTermProfile)
        Creates a copy of the ProofEnvironment of the given Proof which has his own OneStepSimplifier instance. Such copies are required for instance during parallel usage of site proofs because OneStepSimplifier has an internal state.
        Parameters:
        sourceInitConfig - The InitConfig to copy its ProofEnvironment.
        Returns:
        The created ProofEnvironment which is a copy of the environment of the given Proof but with its own OneStepSimplifier instance.

      • disposeOrStore

        public static void disposeOrStore(String description,
                  ApplyStrategy.ApplyStrategyInfo info)

        Stores or disposes the Proof of the ApplyStrategy.ApplyStrategyInfo in SideProofStore.DEFAULT_INSTANCE.

        This method should be called whenever a side proof is no longer needed and should be disposed or stored for debugging purposes.

        Parameters:
        description - The description.
        info - The ApplyStrategy.ApplyStrategyInfo to store or dispose its Proof.
